text.title: nginx Reverse Proxy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the app on a managed platform (Heroku/Railway/Render) or k8s?

branch.question: Does the app need WebSocket upgrade?
Is `$connection_upgrade` map declared in http context?

text.example: VPS host, app at 127.0.0.1:8100 needs WS; map already in /etc/nginx/conf.d/maps.conf → run procedure end-to-end.
